query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.projectState,
  p.priority,
  p.productLane,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  p.enrichmentBlockedReason,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) AS total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named_unverified_contacts,
  COALESCE(MAX(bls.score), 0) AS max_bl_score
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bls ON bls.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND p.enrichmentBlockedReason IS NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, p.productLane, p.discoveryStatus, p.enrichmentBlockedReason, p.lifecycleStatus
HAVING send_ready_contacts = 0 AND max_bl_score >= 50
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, max_bl_score DESC
LIMIT 30;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.projectState,
  p.priority,
  p.productLane,
  p.discoveryStatus,
  p.enrichmentBlockedReason,
  p.lifecycleStatus,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cp.contactId) AS total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named_unverified_contacts,
  COALESCE(MAX(bls.score), 0) AS max_bl_score
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bls ON bls.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  AND p.enrichmentBlockedReason IS NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.priority, p.productLane, p.discoveryStatus, p.enrichmentBlockedReason, p.lifecycleStatus
HAVING send_ready_contacts = 0 AND max_bl_score >= 50
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, max_bl_score DESC
LIMIT 30;
